overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walkthrough of a futuristic nightclub. The player moves from a luxury apartment lounge through maintenance corridors and stairwells down to a vibrant club floor with neon lighting and NPC patrons.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment lounge with neon accents

events.description: moving from lounge area into back room with pool table

agents.ego_description: walking through a futuristic luxury apartment with purple neon lighting and modern furniture

large illuminated aquarium or display window with blue lighting
wooden pool table with cues resting on top
futuristic vending machine with purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a high-end futuristic lounge with purple neon accents and modern furniture. The camera moves forward through the space, passing a round lounge table and glass display window, transitioning into a back room featuring a pool table and vending machines.

events.description: entering dimly lit corridor with yellow-green fluorescent lighting
entering long corridor with metal benches and industrial lighting

agents.ego_description: navigating through back corridors past lockers and storage areas

entered.detail: tall blue metal lockers against the wall
stacked cardboard boxes in the corner
harsh fluorescent tube lighting on the ceiling
simple metal seating along the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to utilitarian back corridors with dim fluorescent lighting. The camera moves past blue lockers, storage boxes, and metal benches in a narrow enclosed space with worn concrete floors, transitioning from the luxury lounge to maintenance areas.

agents.ego_description: descending a dimly lit industrial stairwell with metal railings

entered.detail: black metal railing along the staircase
worn concrete steps leading downward
exposed ventilation ducts on the ceiling
stained and peeling concrete walls

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a narrow industrial stairwell with worn concrete walls and metal railings. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, with exposed ventilation pipes visible overhead as the player moves downward to a lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with holographic ads leading to VIP lounge

events.description: entering VIP lounge area with purple neon lighting
return to vibrant purple and blue neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through corridor with holographic advertisements into a VIP lounge area

entered.detail: illuminated digital posters with purple neon borders
small trees in glowing purple planters
curved bar with purple underlighting
tall silver bar stools in front of the counter
intricate gold patterned wall decoration

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from industrial maintenance areas to a sleek corridor with holographic advertisements and potted plants in neon pots. The camera enters a VIP lounge featuring a purple-lit bar counter, silver stools, and ornate gold wall decorations.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy nightclub main floor with bar and dance area

events.description: entering main club floor from back storage room
crowd density increases as entering main bar area with NPCs

agents.ego_description: exploring the main club area, passing by the bar and patrons

patrons sitting at the bar drinking and conversing

entered.detail: long curved bar with bottles and neon lighting
red neon heart-shaped sign on the wall
green-lit vending machines against the wall
floating holographic bottle advertisement above the bar
circular tables with patrons seated around them

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into the bustling main club floor with moderate crowd density. The camera moves past a long neon-lit bar where a bartender works and patrons socialize. Holographic displays, neon heart signs, and round bar tables fill the vibrant space as the player explores the nightclub.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a high-end private lounge through gritty industrial maintenance areas and finally into a vibrant, crowded nightclub. It begins in a luxury space with purple neon accents and modern furniture, moving past a round table and glass display before shifting into a back room with a pool table and vending machines. The environment then turns utilitarian as the camera glides through dim corridors lined with blue lockers and storage boxes, before descending a narrow industrial stairwell beneath exposed ventilation pipes. As the camera reaches the lower level, the concrete walls give way to a sleek corridor featuring holographic advertisements and potted plants, leading into a VIP lounge with a purple-lit bar and gold decorations. Finally, the scene opens into the bustling main club floor, moving past a long neon-lit bar and socializing patrons amidst holographic displays and glowing heart signs.
